## Problem

What problem does this solve? (1-2 sentences)

## Proposed solution

What do you want to see?

## Alternatives

What other approaches have you considered?

## Out of scope for v1?

Multi-cloud? Terragrunt? Per-environment cost tags? See `ARCHITECTURE.md`
for what's currently in scope.
